mean.note: Kept for historical artefacts only; removed from active runner defaults.

nearest.note: Kept for historical artefacts only; removed from active runner defaults.

fully_connected_inverse_distance.note: Prefer gaussian or idw instead of full inverse-distance graphs.

tv_family_policy: Allow TV-family methods in active scheduling except specific excluded tokens. Experimental TV methods should be validated via light-profile pilots and a Decision Record before wide scheduling.
policy: Do not rewrite historical results in-place. Create companion mapping JSON files under results/ if you need to annotate or adapt old artefacts. Update active runners and prompts to use canonical keys only.
